channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Calgary condo prices and rents fall amid record-high supply levels
item.description: A surge in new housing developments across Calgary has driven down both condo prices and rental rates, according to the Calgary Real Estate Board (CREB). Chief economist Anne-Marie Lurie explained tha...

item.title: The Rise of Puzzle Games in Uncertain Times: A Mental Escape
item.description: In a world filled with chaos and uncertainty, puzzles have seen a surge in popularity. The pandemic catalysed a boom in puzzle games, with apps like Word Wheel and Tradle becoming daily rituals for ma...

item.title: How Pete Hegseth’s CREC Affiliation Influences His Approach to War and Policy
item.description: The article examines how U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth’s membership in the Communion of Reformed Evangelical Churches (CREC) informs his religious rhetoric and approach to military policy. It ex...

item.title: Bangladesh signals fresh approach to ties with India ahead of foreign minister visit
item.description: Bangladesh’s Foreign Affairs Adviser Humayun Kobir said that Dhaka wants to build a new relationship with India based on people-to-people contact, institutional engagement and regular exchanges, rathe...

item.title: Family of Late Teacher Albert Ojwang Honours His Widow with Traditional Luo Dowry Ceremony
item.description: The family of the late teacher Albert Ojwang from Homa Bay County has fulfilled his wish by paying the bride price for his widow, Nevnina Onyango, several months after his tragic death in police custo...

item.title: Southern California Couple Sentenced for Torturing and Killing Teenage Daughter
item.description: In a tragic case from Southern California, Oriana Elias, 38, and Vincent Gibbs, 39, were sentenced to 22 years to life in prison for the torture and death of their 16-year-old daughter, Pearlene Valav...

item.title: Kenyan Artists to Benefit from Higher Music Licence Fees Ahead of 2027 Campaigns
item.description: The editorial highlights the ongoing struggle for Kenyan musicians to earn fair compensation for their creative work, even as other countries reward their artistes handsomely. It points out that the n...

item.title: Authorities verifying reports that Atong Ang is in Vietnam amid extradition efforts
item.description: Philippine authorities are now coordinating with Vietnam to verify intelligence reports that businessman and gaming personality Atong Ang is currently in the country, according to Interior and Local G...

item.title: Two men seriously injured in Calgary Crowchild Trail rollover
item.description: Early on April 6, 2026, a serious vehicle rollover occurred on Calgary’s Crowchild Trail, resulting in two men being transported to hospital with significant injuries. The incident caused temporary tr...

item.title: Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange to be led by banks after Easter break
item.description: Following the Easter long weekend, the Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange (DSE) is expected to see trading activity primarily driven by the banking sector. Despite the lack of immediate catalysts for a broa...

item.title: Eight individuals, including Filipino operators, arrested in $50M hospice fraud in Southern California
item.description: Authorities in Southern California have arrested eight individuals, including Filipino operators, in connection with a $50-million fraud scheme targeting terminally ill patients enrolled in hospice ca...

item.title: Nutella Jar Floats Aboard Artemis II, Gains Unexpected Viral Attention
item.description: During NASA's Artemis II mission, a jar of Nutella gained unexpected attention when it floated across the spacecraft's cabin during a live broadcast. In zero gravity, the jar drifted and turned, displ...

item.title: Nairobi Woman Expresses Concerns About Raising Children Under Ruto’s Leadership
item.description: A young Nairobi woman named Consolata has stirred up serious online debate after saying she cannot have children while President William Ruto is still in power. Speaking to NTV Kenya, Consolata explai...

item.title: Govt calls for accelerated preparations for the 50th anniversary of Saba Saba trade fair
item.description: The government has emphasized the need for rapid preparations for the 2026 Saba Saba trade fair, marking its 50th anniversary. The Deputy Permanent Secretary in the Ministry of Industry and Trade, Mr....

item.title: Scientists warn of potential disruptions to sleep, ecosystems from proposed space mirror constellation
item.description: A California startup called Reflect Orbital is seeking approval to launch a constellation of up to 50,000 mirrors into low Earth orbit. The mirrors would reflect sunlight to the night side of the plan...

item.title: Chhattisgarh High Court sentences Amit Jogi to life for 2003 NCP leader murder
item.description: The Chhattisgarh High Court has sentenced Amit Jogi, son of former Chief Minister Ajit Jogi, to life imprisonment for his involvement in the 2003 murder of Nationalist Congress Party treasurer Ramvata...

item.title: Woman Assaulted and Robbed While Assisting Person in Distress in Downtown Winnipeg
item.description: On March 19, a 45-year-old woman in downtown Winnipeg was assaulted and robbed while attempting to assist a man she believed was overdosing. The incident occurred on the 600 block of Main Street near ...

item.title: Diesel shortages and global oil tensions keep Australian fuel markets unsettled
item.description: Diesel prices across Australia have risen again after a brief drop last week, highlighting ongoing volatility despite the Albanese government’s temporary reduction in fuel excise. Energy Minister Chri...

item.title: IED Blast Injures Five Police Officers in Lakki Marwat Patrol
item.description: In a troubling incident on Tuesday in Shahbazkhel town, Lakki Marwat, at least five policemen, including an assistant sub-inspector, sustained injuries due to an improvised explosive device (IED) atta...

item.title: Boxing Controversy: Accusations of Scripting Erupt After Majembe vs. Mbavu Destroyer Match
item.description: Things got real messy after the boxing match between Majembe and Mbavu Destroyer at the Kasarani Indoor Sports Stadium. While Majembe emerged victorious via TKO, controversy erupted immediately afterw...
